obligations.rule: Ensure `assertString` is called to validate input type.
obligations.why: The function explicitly calls `assertString` to enforce that the input is a string.

obligations.rule: Handle `allow_trailing_dot` option correctly by removing trailing dots.
obligations.why: The code removes trailing dots if `allow_trailing_dot` is true.

obligations.rule: Handle `allow_wildcard` option correctly by removing leading `*.`.
obligations.why: The code removes `*.` if `allow_wildcard` is true.

obligations.rule: Ensure `require_tld` enforces presence of a TLD.
obligations.why: The code checks for at least two parts in the domain if `require_tld` is true.
The code rejects numeric TLDs unless `allow_numeric_tld` is true.
The code explicitly checks for spaces in the TLD.

obligations.rule: Reject parts exceeding 63 characters unless `ignore_max_length` is true.
obligations.why: The code checks the length of each part and respects the `ignore_max_length` option.
The code uses a regex to validate allowed characters in each part.
The code explicitly checks for full-width characters.

obligations.rule: Reject parts starting or ending with hyphens.
obligations.why: The code checks for hyphens at the start or end of each part.
The code rejects underscores unless `allow_underscores` is true.

obligations.rule: Cover the false branch of `if (options.require_tld)` at line 30.
obligations.why: This branch is uncovered and ensures behavior when `require_tld` is false.

obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of `if (/\s/.test(tld))` at line 41.
obligations.why: This branch is uncovered and ensures rejection of TLDs containing spaces.

obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of `if (!options.allow_numeric_tld && /^\d+$/.test(tld))` at line 47.
obligations.why: This branch is uncovered and ensures rejection of numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is false.

obligations.rule: Cover the true branch of `if (!options.allow_underscores && /_/.test(part))` at line 70.
obligations.why: This branch is uncovered and ensures rejection of underscores when `allow_underscores` is false.

test_groups.title: Basic Input Validation
test_groups.rationale: Ensure the input is a string using `assertString`.

test_groups.title: Trailing Dot Handling
test_groups.rationale: Test removal of trailing dots when `allow_trailing_dot` is true.

test_groups.title: Wildcard Handling
test_groups.rationale: Test removal of `*.` when `allow_wildcard` is true.

test_groups.title: TLD Requirement
test_groups.rationale: Ensure presence of a TLD when `require_tld` is true.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD Handling
test_groups.rationale: Test acceptance of numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is true.

test_groups.title: Max Length Enforcement
test_groups.rationale: Reject parts exceeding 63 characters unless `ignore_max_length` is true.

test_groups.title: Hyphen Placement
test_groups.rationale: Reject parts starting or ending with hyphens.

test_groups.title: Underscore Handling
test_groups.rationale: Test acceptance of underscores when `allow_underscores` is true.

test_groups.title: Spaces in TLD
test_groups.rationale: Ensure rejection of TLDs containing spaces.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD Rejection
test_groups.rationale: Ensure rejection of numeric TLDs when `allow_numeric_tld` is false.

test_groups.title: Underscore Rejection
test_groups.rationale: Ensure rejection of underscores when `allow_underscores` is false.
